title: Rogue Command Overview
summary: Overview of what Rogue Command is and which public references support the basic facts.
intro: Rogue Command has an official Steam store page, and Steam lists feneq as developer and publisher. Steam frames the game as single-player RTS gameplay with roguelite build crafting.
allowedClaims: Rogue Command has an official Steam store page.
Steam lists feneq as developer and publisher.
Steam frames the game as single-player RTS gameplay with roguelite build crafting.
Steam categories include Action, Simulation, and Strategy.
The official About page supports limited feneq background.
notes: Overview record for identity, release, and broad gameplay framing.

title: Release and Early Access Timeline
summary: Timeline covering Steam Early Access and the 1.0 release.
intro: Steam lists Rogue Command's full release as 2026-05-14 and its Early Access release as 2024-11-18. Steam announcements support that the game reached 1.0 and left Early Access.
allowedClaims: Steam lists Early Access release as 2024-11-18.
Steam announcements support that Rogue Command reached 1.0 and left Early Access.
notes: Timeline record for date and release-status facts.

title: Beginner Systems Glossary
summary: Glossary entry for key Rogue Command system names used by the guide layer.
intro: Blueprints, Upgrades, Hacks, Engineer, Economy, and Specialist appear in official Steam source material. This entry keeps the public system vocabulary consistent.
allowedClaims: Blueprints, Upgrades, Hacks, Engineer, Economy, and Specialist appear in official Steam source material.
These terms can be listed as core systems.
Detailed effects should be handled in dedicated guide articles.

title: Core Gameplay Loop Overview
summary: High-level gameplay-loop overview using only official-source broad descriptions.
intro: Steam store text supports broad play descriptions: controlling units, building a base, harvesting resources, exploring the map, defending positions, and planning attacks. This metadata does not imply Player Codex has tested or optimized the loop.
allowedClaims: Steam store text supports broad play descriptions: controlling units, building a base, harvesting resources, exploring the map, defending positions, and planning attacks.
The topic can explain the loop at a high level without implying Player Codex has tested or optimized it.
notes: Gameplay-loop record for broad player-facing framing.
